feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Form not shown in MyInbox Workzone standard
entry.content: In my workzone standard portal the My Inbox does show the tasks. But when I click on the task the form is not shown to approve or descline a task (see first screenshot). The inbox is working directly in the SAP BTP cockpit (second screenshot) so it seems a kind of authorization problem.

entry.title: Workzone Header toolbar functions not working
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am encountering an issue in our system (DEV, QAS, PRD) where certain key functions, including User Profile, Notification, Search, and Navigate Back, are not working when pressed. These buttons, highlighted in the attached screenshot. Not thing happended and not issue from console log in browser development tool.

Could you please provide guidance on troubleshooting and resolving this issue?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Henry Nguyen

entry.title: Issue while accessing the Ariba application in BTP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have exposed the Ariba application from on-Prem to BTP workzone, While trying to access the Ariba application inside the BTP work zone we are getting the below error, but while accessing the url outside the BTP workzone it is working correctly. Please let me know if further details needed.

Any suggestions will be helpful to deal with this issue in BTP workzone.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not executing
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I need your expert advice for an issue that I am facing when I deployed a simple UI5 application to cloud foundry.

I have created a simple UI5 which has a button and a label element, on press of which a function is called which displays a MessageBox. 

In view controller, I have added a MessageBox in init, just to verify is init is being called.

When I run the app with no-flp and sandbox, it runs perfectly fine.

When I deployed the app to cf , it is working fine when I open the app from HTML5 applications(I added FLP config while creating project).

Now when i ran the same app on Build Work Zone, the View controller is not loaded. The message box in init as well as button event is not displayed.  I observed that when I inspect the app, the controllers are not loaded in sources tab.

I need your advice for this issue.

entry.title: Workzone Transport tool for Workzone BTP Objects has disappeared
entry.content:
Hello all,

In SAP BTP to transport objects like applications, spaces, roles, etc we used the Transport Management tool that was available in Work Zone.

Since few days ago this option has disappeared. Has anyone encountered the same issue?

 

this is gone now

entry.title: SAP Work Zone: Fiori app not visible in Content Manager Group
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm doing a small PoC on a trial account and I have come across an issue while trying to deploy a Fiori App via BAS to BTP and then expose it to a Work Zone Site.

I have successfully done the following:

1. Create a simple Hello World Fiori app and deployed it to Cloud Foundry

2. Ran the app via the HTML5 Applications tab on BTP Cockpit

3. Assigned the app to the 'Everyone' role in the Content Manager of Work Zone.

4. Created a Group via Content Manager.

PROBLEM: When I try to edit the Group and add the App to it, the App is not visible.

See attached screenshots.

Can someone please shed some light on what could be causing the issue?

entry.title: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content:
I’m currently provisioning PFCG roles from ERP to BTP IAS and automating role federation through Work Zone content packages.

However, the issue lies in Work Zone itself—it’s not enough to simply provision roles. Each role must be manually assigned to a site using the "ASSIGN SITE" button.

Given that there are over 1,000 roles, manually assigning them via the UI is incredibly challenging, especially since there’s no search functionality for unassigned roles!

Is there any way to automate role assignments, or at least make this process easier? Any suggestions or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

 

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP Fiori My Inbox URL generation for intent-based object navigation
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm working on migrating UWL task list to Fiori My Inbox and referring KBA 2274940 - URL generation for intent-based navigation

I'm launching via SAP Work Zone Fiori Inbox Cloud - default webgui / wda

I'm able to configure Open Task via SWFVISU transaction which open the task in a new tab. However, the link in the Related Object tab fails to open the page. 

Configuration has been setup in SWFVISU for Object Visualization. The link generated upon clicked generated as below. The query parameter P_INSTID is generated with encoded value. I tried remove the encoded value manually and the page was able to load correctly. 

https://workzone.host#QMSMObject-process?P_INSTID=%EF%BB%BF0002000021110001%EF%BB%BF&P_CATID=BO&P_TYPEID=QMSM&P_METHOD=DISPLAY

From the web developer tools network response, the parameter is encoded with "Control character zero width no-break space". 

Debug from backend, the field actually returned correct value without any space. 

 

Checked the SAP Notes KBA 3326460 - Related Object links are not working properly in My Inbox does not have information about this error. 

Any idea is there any configuration that I could missed out?

Regards,

Ben

#MyInbox #Fiori #URLGeneration #ObjectVisualization

entry.title: Activation of SAP Mobile Start Application on SAP BTP Neo
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Is there anyway to activate Mobile application 'SAP Mobile Start' using SAP BTP Neo Cockpit?
How to get SAP BTP Cloud Foundry access ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Enterprise Search in SAP Build Work Zone - Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are using SAP Build Work Zone - Standard Edition with backends as S/4HANA Private Edition, Ariba, Successfactors, MDM, GRC etc.

1) Enterprise Search works fine in my S/4HANA, however I am not able to see/configure it in my Build Workzone..what is missing and how do I move it up so that I can search through all my SAP systems.

2) How to make Enterprise search work for SAP Cloud systems like Ariba, Successfactors etc ?

Regards,
Rajan Murthy

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Dear All

I have activated SAP Start using booster and SAP Build Foundation Edition.

Destinations are also created and Roles are exposed to BTP but over SAP Build Site, No App is showing neither roles are appearing in Content Exposure Channel.

Any idea , how to enable Tiles over SAP Start.

entry.title: Build Apps POST call - HTTP 403 Error (Invalid CSRF Token)
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I need your help on something about x-csrf-token problem.

I am making an web application that creates Sales Order to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by Build Apps.

Connection to S/4HANA is made by destination, and web application is deployed to my BTP subaccount's HTML5 Repository.

Screenshot under is the destination I set to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition's "Sales Order(A2X)" OData V2 api.

Type : HTTP

URL : https://{tenant}-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap

Proxy Type : Internet

Authentication : Basic

 

<Additional Properties>

AppgyverEnabled : true

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf : true

HTML5.DynamicDestination : true

sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled : true

sap.build.usage : odata_gen

sap.processautomation.enabled : true

WebIDEEnabled : true

 

Plus, I 

As you can see, I added "BuildApps.RequiresCSRF = true" to my destination so I can see the CSRF token settings too.

However, as I deploy this application and try to create Sales Order, error occurs and I can see this error message in my HTML5 repository.

What should I do to fix this problem??

entry.title: Why the error loop on a Fiori Elements application when running on SAP Work Zone(Launchpad)
entry.content:
I wrote a CAP application with a Fiori Elements, business as usual.

When writing an event handler, I wanted to reject, return an error, if certain condition is met:

this.on('READ', 'MyEntity', async (req) => {
  // ...
  if (!filter) {
    req.reject(500,'Please select a filter.');
  }
  // ...
  return result;
});

What happens is that, if I run the application standalone, locally, or in BTP's HTML5 Repository, it behaves correctly. When an error happens it returns the error and stops. I fix the input and the app runs fine:

One error

 

However, if I run it on SAP WorkZone, standard edition (former Launchpad), either in BTP or using the cds-launchpad-plugin, it enters in an infinite error loop:

Infinite errors

and the list keeps growing. If I close the error screen it immediately re-opens and keeps outputting more errors. The only way to stop it is to exit the page.

To share some light on what's happening, it keeps sending the same "wrong" request. If I put a breakpoint in my application it will hold and stop the loop. But as soon as I release it, the front-end fails and sends the same request again.

The workaround I had to do was to catch the error and return a valid response:

try {
  //...
} catch (e) {
  // throw e; // doesn't work
  // req.reject(e.message); // doesn't work
  console.error(e.message); // log for information
  // return a valid object, but fill the values with the error information
  return [{
    title: "ERROR",
    description: e.message
  }];
}

 

Let me know if you faced something similar and if you know how to stop this infinite loop.

entry.title: Issues Completing Tutorials with SAP Build Work Zone on Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working through the following tutorials:

  • SAP Build Work Zone - Add a Workspace
  • Access SAP Build Apps via SAP Work Zone
  • Work Zone Workshop - Access

However, I am using a trial account and cannot access certain features required for these tutorials. For example:

  • In the SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition, I cannot access the "Manage Workspaces and Workpages" section, which seems to be exclusive to the Advanced Edition.
  • I also noticed that the prerequisites for some tutorials mention receiving a specific URL, username, and password for the training account, which I did not receive.

My main question is:

  • How can I complete these tutorials on a trial account, or is there a way to request temporary access to the Advanced Edition for training purposes?
  • Alternatively, can I contact the tutorial instructor or support team to gain the necessary credentials or guidance?

I appreciate any advice or assistance you can provide to help me resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Luigi Funaro

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a site on Workzone where I have associated an app developed with SAP Build. If I open the site from the browser, I can access the app without any problems. However, if I access it via Mobile Start, I see the application tile, but when I click on it, I get the following error: "unable to load external app" on iOS, "unable to open app" on Android.

The application was developed using a trial account.

Below are all the steps I followed for the configuration:

  • Built and deployed the app in "SAP Build Apps | Build Service" for Work Zone
  • Added the app to Work Zone
  • Enabled the site setting for Mobile Start
  • Tested the app in the web launchpad and it works correctly
  • Downloaded Mobile Start on iOS and Android
  • Performed BTP authentication
  • Successfully connected to the launchpad
  • Viewed group and app
  • Clicking on the app, the error "unable to load external app" appears on iOS and "unable to open app" on Android

Do you have any idea what the problem might be?

Thank you all.

entry.title: Setting up favorites in SAP Build WorkZone - Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

We can save tiles in "My Home" in Fiori Launchpad...however I do not see the option of saving tiles in "My Home" in SAP Build Workzone - Standard Edition.

Does it not allow option for users to save tiles as their favorites.

Regards,
Rajan Murthy

entry.title: Unable to launch SAPUI5 Task while opening in SAP BTP Workzone My Inbox app.
entry.content:
i,

I've followed all the steps as mentioned in the tutorial as well as pre-requisite tutorials in my BTP trial account (Integrate UI5 task  - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-integrate-sapui5-task-process.html    )

However, the My Inbox app is not opening the task, although I can see number of tasks on the tile in the workzone site launchpad. refer screenshots 1 and 2.

Also the Process trigger (local copy) app is not loaded which created using the custom SAP UI5 task (workflow UI MTA module) for SBPA approval Process as per the tutorial (Run process from site - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-business-process-business-site.html ). Refer screenshot 3.

error screenshots given below -

1. MyInbox app shows number of Tasks 

2. Error on opening My Inbox app -

3. Error on load in Process trigger App local copy -

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: Federate content from S/4Hana, SuffessFactors, SAC and Ariba into Build Work Zone
entry.content:
We are exploring if certain roles and Apps from S/4Hana, SAC stories, Ariba and SuccessFactors Fiori Apps can be federated into SAP Build Work Zone, Standard edition.

From S/4Hana, we will be exposing roles to Build Work Zone via the /UI2/CDM3_EXP_SCOPE transaction.

For SAC, Ariba, SF, what is the best way to achieve the same, if such is feasible?

entry.title: SAP S4 Hana Content Federation to SAP Build Workzone | Internal server error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am federating content from S4 Hana 2022 to SAP Build Workzone Standard edition.
I'm able to see the tiles on my site, but when I click on a tile I get blank screen with "Internal Server Error".

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.
